Sample questions:
show me some rollover
show me some motor accident
show me some videos related to falling objects


All Categories:
collision_with_motorcycle

drifting_or_skidding
fire_or_explosions

objects_falling
other_crash
rear_collision
rollover
side_collision
pedestrian_hit

# Sample input query

{
    "query": "show me some white color car collision",
    "categories": "collision_with_motorcycle",
    "duration": 30,
    "input_type":"text"
}

{
  "query": "show me some video's related to bike jumping",
  "categories": "",
  "duration": 9,
  "input_type": "text"
}
